title: Missing error handling in parse_admin_payload for portnum 0
notes: Fixed missing NULL/zero-length payload handling for ADMIN_APP in parse_data and parse_admin_payload (now explicitly MALFORMED). Matches bead description. Verified via code review.
close_reason: Implemented explicit zero-length payload check for admin messages as MALFORMED; parse_admin_payload now guards against invalid inputs including len==0 and NULL. Code updated in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:656 and parse function. Consistent with text/position parsing. Bead fixed.
